categories.name: IT'S ALL GREEK MYTHOLOGY TO ME

questions.clue: Sometimes depicted as a giant, Chrysaor was the fraternal twin brother of this winged animal
This group of gods were the offspring from the post-primeval marriage of Heaven & Earth
Built by Hephaestus, Talos was a bronze robotlike figure who guarded this largest Greek isle

Traditional uses for these little tinned fishies include adding them to puttanesca sauce or Caesar dressing for umami
